lists: Auto-update tools to keep your installation fresh
Over 300 optional plugins including git, docker, kubectl
Over 140 themes to customize your terminal
Auto-update tool to keep installation up to date
Helper functions and aliases for daily use
Cross-platform support for macOS, Linux, and WSL
robbyrussell is the default clean theme
agnoster is powerline-style with git info
powerlevel10k is highly customizable and fast
GitHub Issues for bugs and feature requests
